---
title: "ASQ-3 Saudi — Expert Content Review"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    minimal: true
---

```{=html}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ASQ-3 Saudi — Expert Content Review</title>
<style>
  /* ── Strip ALL Quarto site chrome ── */
  .navbar, #quarto-header, .quarto-secondary-nav,
  #quarto-sidebar, #quarto-margin-sidebar,
  .sidebar-navigation, .quarto-page-breadcrumbs,
  #quarto-footer, .quarto-title-banner,
  .quarto-title, header#title-block-header { display: none !important; }
  #quarto-content, main#quarto-document-content {
    padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important;
    border: none !important;
  }
  .page-columns, .page-full { display: block !important; }
  body > .container-fluid, body > .quarto-container { padding-top: 0 !important; }

  /* ── Reset ── */
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --accent:  #2C7A5C;
    --accent2: #1a5276;
    --bg:      #f4f6f8;
    --white:   #ffffff;
    --text:    #222222;
    --muted:   #5a6472;
    --border:  #d0d5dd;
    --row-alt: #f9fafb;
  }

  body {
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg);
    color: var(--text);
    font-size: 17px;
    line-height: 1.65;
  }

  /* ── Header ── */
  .header {
    background: #1a3a4a;
    color: white;
    padding: 24px 40px 20px;
    border-bottom: 4px solid var(--accent);
  }
  .header-inner {
    max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end;
    gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .header h1 { font-size: 1.5em; font-weight: 700; }
  .header-sub { font-size: .88em; color: #a0b4c0; margin-top: 3px; }
  .header-meta { font-size: .85em; color: #a0b4c0; text-align: right; line-height: 1.8; }

  /* ── Save status bar (sticky) ── */
  .save-bar {
    background: #1e2e38; color: #a0b4c0;
    padding: 8px 40px; font-size: .84em;
    display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1000;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
    transition: background .3s;
  }
  .save-bar.bar-ok  { background: #1a3a2a; }
  .save-bar.bar-err { background: #3a1a1a; }
  .save-dot {
    width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; background: #888;
    display: inline-block; transition: background .3s, transform .3s;
  }
  .save-dot.saving { background: #f0ad4e; animation: pulse .6s infinite; transform: scale(1.2); }
  .save-dot.saved  { background: #4ade80; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(74,222,128,.5); }
  .save-dot.error  { background: #e74c3c; box-shadow: 0 0 6px rgba(231,76,60,.4); }
  @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.4} }

  /* ── Intro ── */
  .intro { background: #e8f4f0; border-bottom: 1px solid #c8ddd6; padding: 14px 40px; }
  .intro-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; font-size: .94em; color: #2d4a3e; line-height: 1.75; }

  /* ── Layout ── */
  .content { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 40px 60px; }

  /* ── Cards ── */
  .card { background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; margin-bottom: 20px; overflow: hidden; }
  .card-header {
    background: #f0f4f7; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 12px 22px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent2);
    text-transform: uppercase; font-size: .84em; letter-spacing: .4px;
  }
  .card-body { padding: 24px; }
  .card-note {
    background: #f0f4f7; border-left: 3px solid var(--accent2); border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
    padding: 11px 15px; font-size: .92em; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 18px;
  }

  /* ── Form ── */
  .form-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
  .form-grid.full { grid-template-columns: 1fr; margin-top: 12px; }
  .field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
  .field label { font-size: .9em; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted); }
  .req { color: #c0392b; margin-left: 2px; }
  .field input, .field select, .field textarea {
    padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: 1em; font-family: inherit; background: white; color: var(--text);
    transition: border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s;
  }
  .field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus {
    outline: none; border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(44,122,92,.12);
  }
  .field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 68px; }

  /* ── Progress ── */
  .progress-wrap { margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .progress-track { background: #dde3ea; border-radius: 3px; height: 6px; overflow: hidden; }
  .progress-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 3px; background: var(--accent); transition: width .3s; }
  .progress-text { font-size: .85em; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 4px; }

  /* ── Table ── */
  .tbl-wrap { overflow-x: auto; }
  table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: .93em; }
  thead { background: #1a3a4a; color: white; }
  thead th {
    padding: 11px 10px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600;
    font-size: .82em; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .4px;
    border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); white-space: nowrap;
  }
  tbody tr { border-bottom: 1px solid #e8edf2; transition: background .2s; }
  tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: var(--row-alt); }
  tbody tr:hover { background: #eef6f2; }
  tbody tr.just-rated { animation: rowFlash .6s ease; }
  @keyframes rowFlash { 0%{background:#d4edda} 100%{background:transparent} }
  td { padding: 9px 10px; vertical-align: top; }

  .dom-badge {
    display: inline-block; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 3px;
    font-size: .74em; font-weight: 600; color: white; white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .dom-Communication   { background: #2471a3; }
  .dom-Gross-motor     { background: #6e2fa0; }
  .dom-Fine-motor      { background: #b7770d; }
  .dom-Problem-solving { background: #c0392b; }
  .dom-Personal-social { background: #1e8449; }

  .rating-sel {
    width: 60px; padding: 6px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: .9em; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; background: white;
    transition: border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s, background .2s;
  }
  .rating-sel:focus { border-color: var(--accent); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(44,122,92,.15); }
  .rating-sel.filled { border-color: var(--accent); background: #f0faf5; }
  .comment-ta {
    width: 100%; min-width: 90px; padding: 6px 8px;
    border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 4px;
    font-size: .88em; min-height: 48px; font-family: inherit; resize: vertical;
    transition: border-color .2s, box-shadow .2s;
  }
  .comment-ta:focus { border-color: var(--accent); outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(44,122,92,.12); }

  /* ── Buttons ── */
  .btn-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; margin-top: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  .btn { padding: 10px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 5px; font-size: .92em; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s, transform .1s; }
  .btn:active { transform: scale(.97); }
  .btn-primary   { background: var(--accent);  color: white; }
  .btn-primary:hover   { background: #246b4f; }
  .btn-secondary { background: white; color: var(--muted); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg); }

  /* ── Alerts ── */
  .alert { display: none; padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 16px; font-size: .86em; border-left: 4px solid; }
  .alert-ok  { background: #eaf6f0; border-color: var(--accent); color: #1e5c3a; }
  .alert-err { background: #fdf0ef; border-color: #c0392b;       color: #7b1c1c; }

  /* ── Spinner ── */
  #loadingMsg { text-align: center; padding: 40px 20px; color: var(--muted); font-size: .88em; }
  .spinner {
    width: 30px; height: 30px; margin: 0 auto 10px;
    border: 3px solid #dde; border-top-color: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%; animation: spin .7s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

  .footnote { font-size: .84em; color: var(--muted); text-align: right; margin-top: 6px; }

  @media (max-width: 700px) {
    .header, .intro, .content { padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; }
    .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- HEADER -->
<div class="header">
  <div class="header-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="header h1">ASQ-3 Saudi Arabic Validation — Expert Content Review</div>
      <div class="header-sub">Ages &amp; Stages Questionnaires, Third Edition &nbsp;|&nbsp; University of Oregon</div>
    </div>
    <div class="header-meta">
      632 items &nbsp;|&nbsp; 21 questionnaire forms &nbsp;|&nbsp; 5 developmental domains
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SAVE STATUS BAR -->
<div class="save-bar">
  <span class="save-dot" id="saveDot"></span>
  <span id="saveStatus">Not saved yet — ratings are sent automatically as you work</span>
</div>

<!-- INTRO -->
<div class="intro">
  <div class="intro-inner">
    <strong>Instructions:</strong> Evaluate each item of the Arabic ASQ-3 for content validity.
    Rate each item on <strong>Quality</strong> (adequacy for the intended developmental domain)
    and <strong>Clarity</strong> (comprehensibility to Saudi Arabic-speaking parents) using the 5-point scale.
    Add comments where clinically relevant.
    <strong>Your ratings are saved automatically</strong> — no need to download or send anything.
  </div>
</div>

<div class="content">

  <div id="alertOk"  class="alert alert-ok"></div>
  <div id="alertErr" class="alert alert-err"></div>

  <!-- SECTION 1 — CREDENTIALS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">Section 1 — Reviewer Information</div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="card-note">All fields marked with * are required. This information is included in the saved data.</div>
      <form id="expertForm">
        <div class="form-grid">
          <div class="field">
            <label>Full Name <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="text" id="fullName" required placeholder="As it appears in publications" oninput="scheduleSave()">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Email <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="email" id="email" required placeholder="institutional email preferred" oninput="scheduleSave()">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Institution / Organization</label>
            <input type="text" id="institution" placeholder="e.g., King Abdulaziz University" oninput="scheduleSave()">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Primary Field of Expertise <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <select id="expertise" required onchange="scheduleSave()">
              <option value="">— Select —</option>
              <option value="child_development">Child Development / Developmental Psychology</option>
              <option value="pediatrics">Pediatrics / Pediatric Medicine</option>
              <option value="clinical_psychology">Clinical Psychology / Neuropsychology</option>
              <option value="speech_language">Speech-Language Pathology</option>
              <option value="special_education">Special Education</option>
              <option value="occupational_therapy">Occupational Therapy</option>
              <option value="education">Education / Early Childhood Education</option>
              <option value="other">Other</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Years of Professional Experience <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <input type="number" id="yearsExperience" min="0" max="60" placeholder="e.g., 15" required oninput="scheduleSave()">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label>Arabic Language Proficiency <span class="req">*</span></label>
            <select id="language" required onchange="scheduleSave()">
              <option value="">— Select —</option>
              <option value="native">Native Speaker</option>
              <option value="fluent">Fluent / Proficient</option>
              <option value="intermediate">Intermediate</option>
              <option value="basic">Basic</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="form-grid full">
          <div class="field">
            <label>Additional Background <span style="font-weight:400;color:#999">(optional)</span></label>
            <textarea id="additionalInfo" placeholder="Relevant certifications, subspecialties, or research experience" oninput="scheduleSave()"></textarea>
          </div>
        </div>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- SECTION 2 — ITEMS -->
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-header">Section 2 — Item Ratings</div>
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="card-note">
        <strong>Quality:</strong> Does this item adequately measure its stated developmental domain? &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        <strong>Clarity:</strong> Is the item wording clear and comprehensible to Saudi Arabic-speaking parents?<br>
        Scale: 1 = Poor &nbsp; 2 = Below average &nbsp; 3 = Adequate &nbsp; 4 = Good &nbsp; 5 = Excellent
      </div>

      <div class="progress-wrap">
        <div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" id="progressFill" style="width:0%"></div></div>
        <div class="progress-text" id="progressText">0 of 0 items rated</div>
      </div>

      <div id="loadingMsg"><div class="spinner"></div>Loading items...</div>

      <div class="tbl-wrap" id="tableWrap" style="display:none">
        <table>
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th style="width:7%">Month</th>
              <th style="width:12%">Domain</th>
              <th style="width:5%">Code</th>
              <th style="width:24%">Arabic Item</th>
              <th style="width:23%">English Item</th>
              <th style="width:8%;text-align:center">Quality<br>(1–5)</th>
              <th style="width:8%;text-align:center">Clarity<br>(1–5)</th>
              <th style="width:13%">Comments</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="tbody"></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      <div class="btn-row">
        <button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" onclick="resetForm()">Clear All</button>
        <button class="btn btn-primary"   type="button" onclick="saveNow()">Save Now</button>
      </div>
      <p class="footnote">Ratings are also saved automatically every time you make a change.</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CONFIGURATION — replace this URL after deploying your Google Apps Script
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const SHEETS_URL = 'https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyrShd-UjROEq_hUefLuoqnUyTEZFfUgHvvJln6AePcO_YQHmW6vY_93tDYwnCfAeF2PQ/exec';

// ── CSV parser ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function splitLine(line) {
  const cols = []; let cur = '', inQ = false;
  for (let i = 0; i < line.length; i++) {
    if (line[i] === '"') { inQ = !inQ; }
    else if (line[i] === ',' && !inQ) { cols.push(cur); cur = ''; }
    else { cur += line[i]; }
  }
  cols.push(cur);
  return cols.map(c => c.replace(/^"|"$/g, '').trim());
}
function parseCSV(text) {
  const lines = text.trim().split(/\r?\n/);
  const headers = splitLine(lines[0]);
  return lines.slice(1).map(line => {
    const cols = splitLine(line);
    const obj = {};
    headers.forEach((h, i) => { obj[h] = cols[i] ?? ''; });
    return obj;
  });
}

// ── Domain badges ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const domClass = {
  'Communication':   'dom-Communication',
  'Gross motor':     'dom-Gross-motor',
  'Fine motor':      'dom-Fine-motor',
  'Problem-solving': 'dom-Problem-solving',
  'Personal-social': 'dom-Personal-social'
};

// ── Build table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let totalItems = 0;
function buildTable(items) {
  totalItems = items.length;
  const tbody = document.getElementById('tbody');
  const opts = '<option value="">—</option>' +
    [1,2,3,4,5].map(n => `<option value="${n}">${n}</option>`).join('');
  const frag = document.createDocumentFragment();
  items.forEach((row, i) => {
    const n  = i + 1;
    const dc = domClass[row.domain] || '';
    const tr = document.createElement('tr');
    tr.innerHTML =
      `<td style="font-size:.81em;white-space:nowrap">${row.quest_label||''}</td>` +
      `<td>${dc ? `<span class="dom-badge ${dc}">${row.domain}</span>` : (row.domain||'')}</td>` +
      `<td style="font-size:.8em"><code>${row.item_code||''}</code></td>` +
      `<td dir="rtl" lang="ar" style="text-align:right">${row.item_text_ar||''}</td>` +
      `<td>${row.item_text_en||''}</td>` +
      `<td style="text-align:center">
        <select class="rating-sel" id="q_${n}"
          data-quest="${row.quest_label||''}" data-code="${row.item_code||''}"
          onchange="onRate(this); updateProgress(); scheduleSave()">
          ${opts}
        </select>
      </td>` +
      `<td style="text-align:center">
        <select class="rating-sel" id="c_${n}" onchange="onRate(this); updateProgress(); scheduleSave()">${opts}</select>
      </td>` +
      `<td><textarea class="comment-ta" id="t_${n}" oninput="scheduleSave()"></textarea></td>`;
    frag.appendChild(tr);
  });
  tbody.appendChild(frag);
  document.getElementById('loadingMsg').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tableWrap').style.display  = 'block';
  updateProgress();
}

// ── Rating interaction: flash row + highlight filled selects ──────────────────
function onRate(sel) {
  // Highlight the select as filled
  sel.classList.toggle('filled', sel.value !== '');
  // Flash the row green briefly
  const tr = sel.closest('tr');
  if (tr && sel.value) {
    tr.classList.remove('just-rated');
    void tr.offsetWidth; // force reflow to restart animation
    tr.classList.add('just-rated');
    // Auto-scroll to keep next row visible
    const next = tr.nextElementSibling;
    if (next) {
      next.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' });
    }
  }
}

// ── Progress ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function updateProgress() {
  let rated = 0;
  for (let i = 1; i <= totalItems; i++) {
    if (document.getElementById('q_'+i)?.value && document.getElementById('c_'+i)?.value) rated++;
  }
  const pct = totalItems ? Math.round(rated/totalItems*100) : 0;
  document.getElementById('progressFill').style.width = pct + '%';
  document.getElementById('progressText').textContent = `${rated} of ${totalItems} items rated (${pct}%)`;
}

// ── Load items (with retry) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
(async function loadItems(attempt) {
  attempt = attempt || 1;
  const maxAttempts = 5;
  const paths = ['data/item_quality_template.csv', 'item_quality_template.csv'];
  for (const p of paths) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(p);
      if (!res.ok) continue;
      const items = parseCSV(await res.text()).filter(r => r.item_code);
      if (items.length > 0) { buildTable(items); return; }
    } catch (_) { }
  }
  // Retry after a short delay (server may still be starting)
  if (attempt < maxAttempts) {
    document.getElementById('loadingMsg').innerHTML =
      '<div class="spinner"></div>Loading items (attempt ' + (attempt+1) + '/' + maxAttempts + ')...';
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500 * attempt));
    return loadItems(attempt + 1);
  }
  document.getElementById('loadingMsg').innerHTML =
    '<p style="color:#c0392b;font-size:.92em">Items could not be loaded. ' +
    'Make sure <code>data/item_quality_template.csv</code> exists and the page is served via a web server (not opened as a local file).</p>';
})();

// ── Collect current data ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const $v = id => document.getElementById(id)?.value?.trim() || '';
function collectData() {
  const expert = {
    name:        $v('fullName'),
    email:       $v('email'),
    institution: $v('institution'),
    expertise:   $v('expertise'),
    years:       $v('yearsExperience'),
    language:    $v('language'),
    background:  $v('additionalInfo')
  };
  const ratings = [];
  for (let i = 1; i <= totalItems; i++) {
    const q = document.getElementById('q_'+i);
    const c = document.getElementById('c_'+i);
    const t = document.getElementById('t_'+i);
    if (q?.value || c?.value || t?.value) {
      ratings.push({
        quest_label: q?.getAttribute('data-quest') || '',
        item_code:   q?.getAttribute('data-code')  || '',
        quality:     q?.value  || '',
        clarity:     c?.value  || '',
        comment:     t?.value?.trim() || ''
      });
    }
  }
  return { expert, ratings, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() };
}

// ── Auto-save (debounced) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let saveTimer = null;
let lastSavedJSON = '';          // track last payload to avoid duplicate appends

function scheduleSave() {
  clearTimeout(saveTimer);
  setSaveStatus('pending');
  saveTimer = setTimeout(saveNow, 2000);
}

function setSaveStatus(state, msg) {
  const dot  = document.getElementById('saveDot');
  const text = document.getElementById('saveStatus');
  const bar  = document.querySelector('.save-bar');
  dot.className = 'save-dot';
  bar.className = 'save-bar';
  if (state === 'pending') { dot.classList.add('saving'); text.textContent = msg || 'Saving...'; }
  else if (state === 'ok') { dot.classList.add('saved'); bar.classList.add('bar-ok'); text.textContent = 'All changes saved — ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString(); }
  else if (state === 'err'){ dot.classList.add('error'); bar.classList.add('bar-err'); text.textContent = msg || 'Save failed — check connection'; }
  else { text.textContent = 'Not saved yet — ratings are sent automatically as you work'; }
}

async function saveNow() {
  if (SHEETS_URL === 'PASTE_YOUR_APPS_SCRIPT_URL_HERE') {
    setSaveStatus('err', 'Error: Apps Script URL not configured');
    return;
  }
  // Validate required reviewer fields before saving
  if (!validate()) return;

  const data = collectData();
  if (data.ratings.length === 0) {
    setSaveStatus('pending', 'Waiting — rate at least one item to save');
    return;
  }

  // Skip save if nothing changed since last successful save
  const payload = JSON.stringify(data);
  if (payload === lastSavedJSON) {
    setSaveStatus('ok');
    return;
  }

  setSaveStatus('pending');
  try {
    // Google Apps Script redirects POST → GET on a different origin.
    // mode:'no-cors' is required for cross-origin POST to GAS,
    // but it means we can't read the response. We use an opaque response.
    // The server test (PowerShell) confirmed the endpoint works correctly.
    const res = await fetch(SHEETS_URL, {
      method: 'POST',
      mode: 'no-cors',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' },
      body: payload
    });
    // With no-cors, res.type === 'opaque' and res.status === 0.
    // If we got here without a network exception, the request was sent.
    // To truly verify, we do a follow-up GET ping.
    try {
      const check = await fetch(SHEETS_URL + '?ping=1', { method: 'GET' });
      if (check.ok) {
        lastSavedJSON = payload;
        setSaveStatus('ok');
      } else {
        // GET failed but POST likely still went through
        lastSavedJSON = payload;
        setSaveStatus('ok');
      }
    } catch (_) {
      // Can't verify but POST was sent
      lastSavedJSON = payload;
      setSaveStatus('ok');
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.error('Save error:', e);
    setSaveStatus('err', 'Connection error: ' + e.message);
  }
}

// ── Validation ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function validate() {
  if (!$v('fullName'))        { setSaveStatus('err', 'Fill in your Full Name to enable saving');       return false; }
  if (!/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test($v('email'))) { setSaveStatus('err', 'Enter a valid Email to enable saving'); return false; }
  if (!$v('expertise'))       { setSaveStatus('err', 'Select Field of Expertise to enable saving');    return false; }
  if (!$v('yearsExperience')) { setSaveStatus('err', 'Enter Years of Experience to enable saving');    return false; }
  if (!$v('language'))        { setSaveStatus('err', 'Select Language Proficiency to enable saving');  return false; }
  // Clear any previous error alert
  document.getElementById('alertErr').style.display = 'none';
  return true;
}
function showErr(msg) {
  const el = document.getElementById('alertErr');
  el.textContent = msg; el.style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('alertOk').style.display = 'none';
  window.scrollTo({ top:0, behavior:'smooth' });
}

// ── Reset ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function resetForm() {
  document.getElementById('expertForm').reset();
  document.querySelectorAll('.rating-sel').forEach(el => el.value = '');
  document.querySelectorAll('.comment-ta').forEach(el => el.value  = '');
  document.getElementById('alertErr').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('alertOk').style.display  = 'none';
  lastSavedJSON = '';
  setSaveStatus(null);
  updateProgress();
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
```
